docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,750.00 FILED BY SHETTY, PRASHANTH AS TO DEFENDANT SAFE SITE CHECK IN LLC ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-08-2025 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506
REQUEST TO POSTPONE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING FILED BY DEFENDANT SAFE SITE CHECK IN LLC

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-08-2025 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO JUN-20-2025 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 BY VISITING JUDGE: JOHN TRUE. APPEARANCES: PLAINTIFF PRASHANTH SHETTY IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT SAFE SITE CHECK IN LLC IS NOT PRESENT. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: M. DE LUNA. NOT REPORTED, (D506)
ORDER FOR CONTINUANCE RE: PROOF OF SERVICE
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE TRIAL APPROVED*** PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT.
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUN-20-2025 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF DEFENDANT TO JUL-08-2025 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506
DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE: NOT LISTED FILED BY PLAINTIFF SHETTY, PRASHANTH AS TO DEFENDANT SAFE SITE CHECK IN LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2025 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF SHETTY, PRASHANTH RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SAFE SITE CHECK IN LLC $2,750.00 PRINCIPAL, $132.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,882.00, PER $8 OF WRITTEN CONTRACT, PLAINTIFF WAS ENTITLED TO 15 DAYS WRITTEN NOTICE OF TERMINATION OF CONTRACT. CONTRACT PROHIBITS ORAL MODIFICATION (SEE 2ND 418) STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVICE FEE: $82.00 SERVED MAY-12-2025, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT SAFE SITE CHECK IN LLC
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-08-2025 - CONTINUED TO JUL-08-2025 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506
